message:
Running command: # Check all generated artifacts summary
echo "=== STAGE 1 ARTIFACTS ==="
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/*.md 2>/dev/null
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/config/soc_config.yaml 2>/dev/null
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/advisory/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== STAGE 2 ARTIFACTS ==="
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/ 2>/dev/null
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "scenario count above"

echo ""
echo "=== STAGE 3 ARTIFACTS ==="
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== STAGE 4 ARTIFACTS ==="
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== STAGE 5 ARTIFACTS ==="
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== STAGE 6 (PnR) ARTIFACTS ==="
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/ 2>/dev/null
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/ 2>/dev/null
